title: SebaHub Tim Lost Something? Participant Acknowledgement, Waiver and Release
intro: By registering for and participating in Tim Lost Something?, I confirm and agree that:
acceptanceStatement: I have read and agree to the Tim Lost Something? Participation Waiver, Release and Rules. I understand that participation involves outdoor risks, that I must search only in approved areas, and that I participate voluntarily and at my own risk.
guardianStatement: I confirm that I am the parent or legal guardian of each minor listed, that the information is accurate, and that I accept this agreement on their behalf. I will directly supervise them throughout their participation.

blocks.text: I am choosing to participate voluntarily. I understand that participation may involve walking outdoors on trails, grass, sand and uneven ground and may include exposure to weather, insects, vegetation, water, other visitors and changing property conditions.

An account holder may participate by confirming that they are at least 18 years old, or, if they are under 18, by confirming that their parent or legal guardian reviewed the current legal documents with them, gave permission, and will supervise their participation.

A participant under 18 may create an individual account only with that parent or legal guardian permission and supervision. A minor account holder may not register or accept this agreement for another supervised minor.
An adult account holder may separately list directly supervised minors and accept this agreement on their behalf.
I will search only during posted hunt hours and only in areas marked as approved on the official search map or by SebaHub staff.
I will not enter:

items: Private homes or neighbouring properties
Guest accommodations or occupied campsites
Event spaces during private bookings
Farmyard or animal enclosures
Construction, maintenance or storage areas
Fenced, locked or signed restricted areas
Water, shorelines marked as restricted, steep slopes or cliff-edge areas
Any location closed by SebaHub staff

blocks.text: I understand that appearing on Tim's original route does not automatically mean that a location is open for public searching.
I will not:

items: Dig, cut trees or remove vegetation
Climb buildings, fences, trees or structures
Move heavy objects or damage landscaping
Enter locked, closed or restricted areas
Start fires
Use vehicles, machinery, drones or excavation equipment to search
Disturb guests, residents, staff or private events
Feed, touch, chase or otherwise pester the Farmyard Friends
Leave garbage or damage any part of the village

blocks.text: I will follow all signs and staff instructions immediately.
I understand that outdoor participation carries risks, including slips, trips, falls, uneven surfaces, weather, insects, water hazards, natural obstacles and the actions of other people.
I voluntarily accept the ordinary risks associated with participating in the activity.

To the fullest extent permitted by law, I release and hold harmless SebaHub, the participating property owners and operators, and their directors, employees, contractors, volunteers and representatives from claims arising from my participation, including claims connected with personal injury, property loss or property damage.
This release is not intended to exclude liability that cannot legally be excluded.
I understand that I remain responsible for my own conduct, safety and belongings.
I will report any potential find through the official website form or another contact method published on the campaign website.
I will not publish photographs or identifying details from Tim's ID or other personal documents.
I understand that a reported find may need to be photographed, documented and verified before it is confirmed.
After completing registration, I may be asked to show my confirmation to receive a SebaHub clue coin.
The coin identifies me as a registered participant for clue access. It does not grant access to restricted areas and does not replace my responsibility to follow the rules.
I understand that SebaHub may remove or disqualify anyone who:

items: Enters restricted areas
Damages property
Disturbs animals, guests or residents
Creates a safety concern
Ignores staff instructions
Provides false registration information

blocks.text: I understand that campaign contact methods are not an emergency service. In an emergency, I will call 911.
By checking the required box and submitting the form, I confirm that:

items: I have read and understood this agreement
I have had the opportunity to ask questions
The name and contact information entered belong to me
I agree to be bound by this acknowledgement, waiver, release and the official hunt rules

blocks.text: A private report is reviewed by SebaHub before publication. If an operator approves and publishes it, the edited story, waypoint, submitted GPS coordinates, adult Hunter handle and individually selected metadata-free images may appear publicly on the campaign Updates page.

Reporter email addresses and phone numbers are never included in public report posts. A participant under 18 is attributed only as Young Hunter; the minor's name, display name and Hunter handle are not published.
Submitted images remain private unless an operator separately selects each processed image for publication. Original files and embedded metadata are not published.
